content: Wake Lock API (INP-05): navigator.wakeLock.request('screen') returns WakeLockSentinel. Browser auto-releases when document visibility becomes hidden. Standard re-acquire pattern: document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', async () => { if(document.visibilityState==='visible' && !sentinel) sentinel = await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen'); }). Feature-detect with 'wakeLock' in navigator. Silently no-ops on unsupported. Chrome Android + Windows Chrome both support it. Acquire on match start, release on match end.
